mapper.select: WITH reservation_stats AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approved_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'EXPIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired_reservations FROM reservation WHERE start_time >= #{rangeStart} AND start_time < #{rangeEnd} ), borrow_stats AS ( SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE borrow_time >= #{rangeStart} AND borrow_time < #{rangeEnd} ), 0) AS total_borrows, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE return_time IS NOT NULL AND return_time >= #{rangeStart} AND return_time < #{rangeEnd} ), 0) AS total_returns FROM dual ), overdue_stats AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_overdue, COALESCE(SUM(overdue_hours), 0) AS total_overdue_hours FROM overdue_record WHERE created_at >= #{rangeStart} AND created_at < #{rangeEnd} ) SELECT #{statDate} AS stat_date, 'DEVICE_UTILIZATION' AS stat_type, 'DAY' AS granularity, 'GLOBAL' AS subject_type, 'ALL' AS subject_value, COALESCE(r.total_reservations, 0) AS total_reservations, COALESCE(r.approved_reservations, 0) AS approved_reservations, COALESCE(r.rejected_reservations, 0) AS rejected_reservations, COALESCE(r.cancelled_reservations, 0) AS cancelled_reservations, COALESCE(r.expired_reservations, 0) AS expired_reservations, COALESCE(b.total_borrows, 0) AS total_borrows, COALESCE(b.total_returns, 0) AS total_returns, COALESCE(o.total_overdue, 0) AS total_overdue, COALESCE(o.total_overdue_hours, 0) AS total_overdue_hours, CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.total_reservations, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((COALESCE(b.total_borrows, 0) * 100.0) / r.total_reservations, 2) END AS utilization_rate FROM reservation_stats r, borrow_stats b, overdue_stats o

WITH reservation_stats AS ( SELECT device_id, COUNT(*) AS total_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approved_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'EXPIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired_reservations FROM reservation WHERE start_time >= #{rangeStart} AND start_time < #{rangeEnd} GROUP BY device_id ), borrow_stats AS ( SELECT stats.device_id, SUM(stats.total_borrows) AS total_borrows, SUM(stats.total_returns) AS total_returns FROM ( SELECT device_id, COUNT(*) AS total_borrows, 0 AS total_returns FROM borrow_record WHERE borrow_time >= #{rangeStart} AND borrow_time < #{rangeEnd} GROUP BY device_id UNION ALL SELECT device_id, 0 AS total_borrows, COUNT(*) AS total_returns FROM borrow_record WHERE return_time IS NOT NULL AND return_time >= #{rangeStart} AND return_time < #{rangeEnd} GROUP BY device_id ) stats GROUP BY stats.device_id ), overdue_stats AS ( SELECT device_id, COUNT(*) AS total_overdue, COALESCE(SUM(overdue_hours), 0) AS total_overdue_hours FROM overdue_record WHERE created_at >= #{rangeStart} AND created_at < #{rangeEnd} GROUP BY device_id ) SELECT #{statDate} AS stat_date, 'DEVICE_UTILIZATION' AS stat_type, 'DAY' AS granularity, 'DEVICE' AS subject_type, d.id AS subject_value, COALESCE(r.total_reservations, 0) AS total_reservations, COALESCE(r.approved_reservations, 0) AS approved_reservations, COALESCE(r.rejected_reservations, 0) AS rejected_reservations, COALESCE(r.cancelled_reservations, 0) AS cancelled_reservations, COALESCE(r.expired_reservations, 0) AS expired_reservations, COALESCE(b.total_borrows, 0) AS total_borrows, COALESCE(b.total_returns, 0) AS total_returns, COALESCE(o.total_overdue, 0) AS total_overdue, COALESCE(o.total_overdue_hours, 0) AS total_overdue_hours, CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.total_reservations, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((COALESCE(b.total_borrows, 0) * 100.0) / r.total_reservations, 2) END AS utilization_rate FROM device d LEFT JOIN reservation_stats r ON r.device_id = d.id LEFT JOIN borrow_stats b ON b.device_id = d.id LEFT JOIN overdue_stats o ON o.device_id = d.id WHERE COALESCE(r.total_reservations, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(b.total_borrows, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(o.total_overdue, 0) > 0

WITH reservation_stats AS ( SELECT d.category_id, COUNT(*) AS total_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approved_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'EXPIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired_reservations FROM reservation r INNER JOIN device d ON d.id = r.device_id WHERE r.start_time >= #{rangeStart} AND r.start_time < #{rangeEnd} GROUP BY d.category_id ), borrow_stats AS ( SELECT stats.category_id, SUM(stats.total_borrows) AS total_borrows, SUM(stats.total_returns) AS total_returns FROM ( SELECT d.category_id, COUNT(*) AS total_borrows, 0 AS total_returns FROM borrow_record b INNER JOIN device d ON d.id = b.device_id WHERE b.borrow_time >= #{rangeStart} AND b.borrow_time < #{rangeEnd} GROUP BY d.category_id UNION ALL SELECT d.category_id, 0 AS total_borrows, COUNT(*) AS total_returns FROM borrow_record b INNER JOIN device d ON d.id = b.device_id WHERE b.return_time IS NOT NULL AND b.return_time >= #{rangeStart} AND b.return_time < #{rangeEnd} GROUP BY d.category_id ) stats GROUP BY stats.category_id ), overdue_stats AS ( SELECT d.category_id, COUNT(*) AS total_overdue, COALESCE(SUM(o.overdue_hours), 0) AS total_overdue_hours FROM overdue_record o INNER JOIN device d ON d.id = o.device_id WHERE o.created_at >= #{rangeStart} AND o.created_at < #{rangeEnd} GROUP BY d.category_id ) SELECT #{statDate} AS stat_date, 'CATEGORY_UTILIZATION' AS stat_type, 'DAY' AS granularity, 'CATEGORY' AS subject_type, c.id AS subject_value, COALESCE(r.total_reservations, 0) AS total_reservations, COALESCE(r.approved_reservations, 0) AS approved_reservations, COALESCE(r.rejected_reservations, 0) AS rejected_reservations, COALESCE(r.cancelled_reservations, 0) AS cancelled_reservations, COALESCE(r.expired_reservations, 0) AS expired_reservations, COALESCE(b.total_borrows, 0) AS total_borrows, COALESCE(b.total_returns, 0) AS total_returns, COALESCE(o.total_overdue, 0) AS total_overdue, COALESCE(o.total_overdue_hours, 0) AS total_overdue_hours, CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.total_reservations, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((COALESCE(b.total_borrows, 0) * 100.0) / r.total_reservations, 2) END AS utilization_rate FROM device_category c LEFT JOIN reservation_stats r ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN borrow_stats b ON b.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN overdue_stats o ON o.category_id = c.id WHERE COALESCE(r.total_reservations, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(b.total_borrows, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(o.total_overdue, 0) > 0

WITH reservation_stats AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approved_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'EXPIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired_reservations FROM reservation WHERE start_time >= #{rangeStart} AND start_time < #{rangeEnd} ), borrow_stats AS ( SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE borrow_time >= #{rangeStart} AND borrow_time < #{rangeEnd} ), 0) AS total_borrows, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE return_time IS NOT NULL AND return_time >= #{rangeStart} AND return_time < #{rangeEnd} ), 0) AS total_returns FROM dual ), overdue_stats AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_overdue, COALESCE(SUM(overdue_hours), 0) AS total_overdue_hours FROM overdue_record WHERE created_at >= #{rangeStart} AND created_at < #{rangeEnd} ) SELECT #{statDate} AS stat_date, 'USER_BORROW' AS stat_type, 'DAY' AS granularity, 'GLOBAL' AS subject_type, 'ALL' AS subject_value, COALESCE(r.total_reservations, 0) AS total_reservations, COALESCE(r.approved_reservations, 0) AS approved_reservations, COALESCE(r.rejected_reservations, 0) AS rejected_reservations, COALESCE(r.cancelled_reservations, 0) AS cancelled_reservations, COALESCE(r.expired_reservations, 0) AS expired_reservations, COALESCE(b.total_borrows, 0) AS total_borrows, COALESCE(b.total_returns, 0) AS total_returns, COALESCE(o.total_overdue, 0) AS total_overdue, COALESCE(o.total_overdue_hours, 0) AS total_overdue_hours, NULL AS utilization_rate FROM reservation_stats r, borrow_stats b, overdue_stats o

WITH reservation_stats AS ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS total_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approved_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'EXPIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired_reservations FROM reservation WHERE start_time >= #{rangeStart} AND start_time < #{rangeEnd} GROUP BY user_id ), borrow_stats AS ( SELECT stats.user_id, SUM(stats.total_borrows) AS total_borrows, SUM(stats.total_returns) AS total_returns FROM ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS total_borrows, 0 AS total_returns FROM borrow_record WHERE borrow_time >= #{rangeStart} AND borrow_time < #{rangeEnd} GROUP BY user_id UNION ALL SELECT user_id, 0 AS total_borrows, COUNT(*) AS total_returns FROM borrow_record WHERE return_time IS NOT NULL AND return_time >= #{rangeStart} AND return_time < #{rangeEnd} GROUP BY user_id ) stats GROUP BY stats.user_id ), overdue_stats AS ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS total_overdue, COALESCE(SUM(overdue_hours), 0) AS total_overdue_hours FROM overdue_record WHERE created_at >= #{rangeStart} AND created_at < #{rangeEnd} GROUP BY user_id ) SELECT #{statDate} AS stat_date, 'USER_BORROW' AS stat_type, 'DAY' AS granularity, 'USER' AS subject_type, u.id AS subject_value, COALESCE(r.total_reservations, 0) AS total_reservations, COALESCE(r.approved_reservations, 0) AS approved_reservations, COALESCE(r.rejected_reservations, 0) AS rejected_reservations, COALESCE(r.cancelled_reservations, 0) AS cancelled_reservations, COALESCE(r.expired_reservations, 0) AS expired_reservations, COALESCE(b.total_borrows, 0) AS total_borrows, COALESCE(b.total_returns, 0) AS total_returns, COALESCE(o.total_overdue, 0) AS total_overdue, COALESCE(o.total_overdue_hours, 0) AS total_overdue_hours, NULL AS utilization_rate FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN reservation_stats r ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN borrow_stats b ON b.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN overdue_stats o ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE COALESCE(r.total_reservations, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(b.total_borrows, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(o.total_overdue, 0) > 0

SELECT #{statDate} AS stat_date, 'OVERDUE_STAT' AS stat_type, 'DAY' AS granularity, 'GLOBAL' AS subject_type, 'ALL' AS subject_value, 0 AS total_reservations, 0 AS approved_reservations, 0 AS rejected_reservations, 0 AS cancelled_reservations, 0 AS expired_reservations, 0 AS total_borrows, 0 AS total_returns, COUNT(*) AS total_overdue, COALESCE(SUM(overdue_hours), 0) AS total_overdue_hours, NULL AS utilization_rate FROM overdue_record WHERE created_at >= #{rangeStart} AND created_at < #{rangeEnd}

SELECT #{statDate} AS stat_date, 'TIME_DISTRIBUTION' AS stat_type, 'DAY' AS granularity, 'TIME_SLOT' AS subject_type, CASE WHEN HOUR(start_time) < 10 THEN CONCAT('0', HOUR(start_time)) ELSE CAST(HOUR(start_time) AS CHAR) END AS subject_value, COUNT(*) AS total_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approved_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'EXPIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired_reservations, 0 AS total_borrows, 0 AS total_returns, 0 AS total_overdue, 0 AS total_overdue_hours, NULL AS utilization_rate FROM reservation WHERE start_time >= #{rangeStart} AND start_time < #{rangeEnd} GROUP BY HOUR(start_time)

SELECT id, stat_date, stat_type, granularity, subject_type, subject_value, total_reservations, approved_reservations, rejected_reservations, cancelled_reservations, expired_reservations, total_borrows, total_returns, total_overdue, total_overdue_hours, utilization_rate, created_at, updated_at FROM statistics_daily WHERE stat_date = #{statDate} AND stat_type = #{statType} AND subject_type = 'GLOBAL' AND subject_value = 'ALL' LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: WITH reservation_stats AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approved_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled_reservations, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'EXPIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired_reservations FROM reservation r INNER JOIN device d ON d.id = r.device_id WHERE r.start_time >= #{rangeStart} AND r.start_time < #{rangeEnd} ), borrow_stats AS ( SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record b INNER JOIN device d ON d.id = b.device_id WHERE b.borrow_time >= #{rangeStart} AND b.borrow_time < #{rangeEnd} ), 0) AS total_borrows, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record b INNER JOIN device d ON d.id = b.device_id WHERE b.return_time IS NOT NULL AND b.return_time >= #{rangeStart} AND b.return_time < #{rangeEnd} ), 0) AS total_returns FROM dual ), overdue_stats AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_overdue, COALESCE(SUM(o.overdue_hours), 0) AS total_overdue_hours FROM overdue_record o INNER JOIN device d ON d.id = o.device_id WHERE o.created_at >= #{rangeStart} AND o.created_at < #{rangeEnd} ) SELECT #{statDate} AS stat_date, 'CATEGORY_UTILIZATION' AS stat_type, 'DAY' AS granularity, 'GLOBAL' AS subject_type, 'ALL' AS subject_value, COALESCE(r.total_reservations, 0) AS total_reservations, COALESCE(r.approved_reservations, 0) AS approved_reservations, COALESCE(r.rejected_reservations, 0) AS rejected_reservations, COALESCE(r.cancelled_reservations, 0) AS cancelled_reservations, COALESCE(r.expired_reservations, 0) AS expired_reservations, COALESCE(b.total_borrows, 0) AS total_borrows, COALESCE(b.total_returns, 0) AS total_returns, COALESCE(o.total_overdue, 0) AS total_overdue, COALESCE(o.total_overdue_hours, 0) AS total_overdue_hours, CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.total_reservations, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((COALESCE(b.total_borrows, 0) * 100.0) / r.total_reservations, 2) END AS utilization_rate FROM reservation_stats r, borrow_stats b, overdue_stats o
